description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push. The workflow has three jobs: test, build, and release. The test job uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple OS and Python versions, installing poetry and running tests. The build job depends on test, runs on ubuntu-latest if the push is a tag, and builds the project with poetry. The release job depends on build, uploads the build artifact, generates a changelog, and releases the project to GitHub and PyPI.
